about.title: Nemnovo — tour base for your rest
about.p1: We create conditions for a quiet rest in Belarus: nature, silence and everything you need on the territory.
about.p2: We focus on guests from Grodno, Minsk and all of Belarus — families, groups of friends and those who value simplicity and closeness to nature.

reviews.text: Quiet place, nature, everything is welcoming. Recommend.
reviews.author: Anna, Grodno

reviews.text: Family trip — kids loved it, we'll come back.
reviews.author: Dmitry, Minsk

reviews.text: Clean, cosy, attentive hosts. Great fishing.
reviews.author: Sergey, Vitebsk

reviews.text: Third year here — always warm and peaceful.
reviews.author: Olga & Igor, Grodno

reviews.text: Kids had a blast, we relaxed. Sauna is great!
reviews.author: Alexey, Minsk

reviews.text: Nature, silence, campfire by the water — perfect weekend.
reviews.author: Maria, Brest

reviews.text: Just like the photos, even better. Thanks for the hospitality!
reviews.author: Natalia, Gomel

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.intro: Requests go to office@nemnovotour.by. Complaints and suggestions to a separate email.
contact.inboxNote: Requests go to office@nemnovotour.by. We will reply within a day.
contact.complaintIntro: Complaints and suggestions go to marketingnemnovo@list.ru.
contact.thanks: Thank you, we have received your message.

footer.slogan: Close. Unfamiliar. Belarus. Create vivid memories with us!
footer.address: Belarus, Grodno region, Grodno district, Sopotskin s/s, Nemnovo village, 15. GPS: 53°51′47″N, 23°45′44″E

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.p1: This policy defines the processing of personal data on the Nemnovo website.
privacy.p2: The site may use cookies and analytics data (Google Analytics, Yandex Metrica).
privacy.p3: Data from contact forms is used only to respond to your message.
